'''âng-sh-n''' ('''kangashan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yrn|yrn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yrn|yrn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-sh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kangashan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingashan|thingashan]] || [[word:jingashan|jingashan]] || [[word:shingashan|shingashan]] || [[word:kingashan|kingashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungashan|thuthungashan]] || [[word:jujungashan|jujungashan]] || [[word:shushungashan|shushungashan]] || [[word:kukungashan|kukungashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungashan|thungashan]] || [[word:jungashan|jungashan]] || [[word:shungashan|shungashan]] || [[word:kungashan|kungashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungashan|thungashan]] || [[word:jungashan|jungashan]] || [[word:shungashan|shungashan]] || [[word:kungashan|kungashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengashan|thengashan]] || [[word:jengashan|jengashan]] || [[word:shengashan|shengashan]] || [[word:kengashan|kengashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongashan|thothongashan]] || [[word:jojongashan|jojongashan]] || [[word:shoshongashan|shoshongashan]] || [[word:kokongashan|kokongashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongashan|thongashan]] || [[word:jongashan|jongashan]] || [[word:shongashan|shongashan]] || [[word:kongashan|kongashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongashan|thongashan]] || [[word:jongashan|jongashan]] || [[word:shongashan|shongashan]] || [[word:kongashan|kongashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngashan|thĂŠngashan]] || [[word:jĂŠngashan|jĂŠngashan]] || [[word:shĂŠngashan|shĂŠngashan]] || [[word:kĂŠngashan|kĂŠngashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangashan|thathangashan]] || [[word:jajangashan|jajangashan]] || [[word:shashangashan|shashangashan]] || [[word:kakangashan|kakangashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangashan|thangashan]] || [[word:jangashan|jangashan]] || [[word:shangashan|shangashan]] || [[word:kangashan|kangashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangashan|thangashan]] || [[word:jangashan|jangashan]] || [[word:shangashan|shangashan]] || [[word:kangashan|kangashan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangashan|shangashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangashan|goshangashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangashan|gokishangashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangashanĂŒ|shangashanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangashanknĂŒ|goshangashanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashanĂŒ|gokishangashanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangashanshĂ«|shangashanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangashankshĂ«|goshangashankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangashanshĂ«|gokishangashanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashanro|shangashanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashankro|goshangashankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashanro|gokishangashanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashanmu|shangashanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashankmu|goshangashankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashanmu|gokishangashanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangashansher|shangashansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangashanksher|goshangashanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangashansher|gokishangashansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangashang|shangashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangashankng|goshangashankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangashang|gokishangashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangashanya|shangashanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangashankya|goshangashankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangashanya|gokishangashanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangashanyam|shangashanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangashankyam|goshangashankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangashanyam|gokishangashanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashanĂŒshĂ«|shangashanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashanknĂŒshĂ«|goshangashanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashanĂŒshĂ«|gokishangashanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashanĂŒro|shangashanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashanknĂŒro|goshangashanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashanĂŒro|gokishangashanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashanĂŒmu|shangashanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashanknĂŒmu|goshangashanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashanĂŒmu|gokishangashanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashanshĂ«nĂŒ|shangashanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangashankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangashanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashanshĂ«ro|shangashanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashankshĂ«ro|goshangashankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashanshĂ«ro|gokishangashanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashanshĂ«mu|shangashanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashankshĂ«mu|goshangashankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashanshĂ«mu|gokishangashanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashanronĂŒ|shangashanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashankronĂŒ|goshangashankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashanronĂŒ|gokishangashanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashanroshĂ«|shangashanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashankroshĂ«|goshangashankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashanroshĂ«|gokishangashanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashanromu|shangashanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashankromu|goshangashankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashanromu|gokishangashanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashanmunĂŒ|shangashanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashankmunĂŒ|goshangashankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashanmunĂŒ|gokishangashanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashanmushĂ«|shangashanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashankmushĂ«|goshangashankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashanmushĂ«|gokishangashanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashanmuro|shangashanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashankmuro|goshangashankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashanmuro|gokishangashanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
